behavior_summary: U8P_BEDROLL implements two processes: U8P_BEDROLL::look and U8P_BEDROLL::use.
U8P_BEDROLL::look is the object's inspect handler and simply displays the short label/bark "bedroll" to the player.
U8P_BEDROLL::use handles the player using the bedroll: it prevents resting if the avatar is in combat or nearby enemies, otherwise presents a menu of rest durations (options "0" through "5").

If the player selects a positive number of periods, the script saves the current avatar stasis, sets stasis (pausing controls/AI), fades the screen to black (spawn + wait), advances in-game time by the chosen periods (inferred as periods * 4 hours), optionally spawns a short helper process for timing, restores the avatar's HP and Mana based on actor stats (inferred formula from Str/Int reads), fades back in, and restores the previous stasis value.
Choosing 0 (or no positive selection) results in no effective rest beyond UI cleanup.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BEDROLL::use first guards the rest action by calling Npc::isInCombat and Npc::areEnemiesNear; if either indicates danger, the rest flow is aborted (guard).
If resting is allowed, FREE::closeAllGumps is called to clean up UI before presenting the rest-duration menu and performing fades (cleanup).

A MenuSet/Ask sequence populates local1 with strings "0".."5" and captures the player's selection into local2; subsequent strcmp-style branching maps that selection to a numeric local3 (menu-to-duration mapping).

When local3 > 0 the script saves current avatar stasis via getAvatarInStasis into local4, sets avatar stasis with setAvatarInStasis, spawns a FadeToBlack process and waits, advances TimeInGameHours by local3 * 4 (inferred), spawns/waits a short helper (FREE::func1C19) for timing, computes new HP/Mana from actor stats (reads Npc::getStr, Npc::getInt and sets via Npc::setHp, Npc::setMana), spawns a FadeFromBlack and waits, and finally restores the saved stasis state (animation + restore).
open_questions: Exact mapping of a 'period' to in-game hours: code patterns suggest 4 hours per period but this is inferred rather than explicitly documented (confidence: medium).
The precise role and side effects of the spawned FREE::func1C19 helper (spawned with argument 0) are unclear — likely timing/sound/animation synchronization (confidence: low).

Exact HP/Mana restoration formula: the excerpt shows reading Str/Int and writing HP/Mana; the numeric multiplier (inferred as *2) is not explicitly named and should be treated as likely, not certain (confidence: medium).
Behavior edge-cases when menu selection is cancelled or returns unexpected values: script appears to treat non-positive choices as no-op, but recovery paths are inferred (confidence: low).

main_function.name: U8P_BEDROLL::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short player-facing description when the player inspects/looks at the bedroll; emits a single bark/label and suspends.
entry_conditions: Triggered by a player 'U8P_BEDROLL::look' / inspect action on the bedroll object (engine U8P_BEDROLL::look/inspect event).

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::look
function_map.role: inspect/description handler that barks the object's short label.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::use
function_map.role: U8P_BEDROLL::use-action handler which implements a guarded rest mechanic: presents a duration menu, advances time, fades screen, and restores HP/Mana while managing avatar stasis.

function_map.name: Npc::isInCombat
function_map.role: external guard used by U8P_BEDROLL::use to detect combat state and block rest.

function_map.name: Npc::areEnemiesNear
function_map.role: external proximity guard used by U8P_BEDROLL::use to detect nearby hostiles and block rest.

external_calls.purpose: Check whether the avatar is currently in combat to prevent resting.
Check for nearby hostile enemies that should prevent resting.
Close UI windows/gumps before showing the rest menu and performing fade transitions.
Build and present a menu of rest-duration options (strings "0".."5") and capture the player's choice.
Read current avatar stasis so it can be restored after the rest sequence.
Set avatar stasis (pause controls/AI) while the fade/rest sequence runs and later restore it.
Spawn fade-out and fade-in processes and wait for their completion around the rest interval (animation/transition).
Read and set in-game time; advance time by the rest duration (inferred mapping: periods * 4 hours).
Spawn a short auxiliary helper and wait briefly for timing/synchronization during the rest sequence.
Read the actor's Strength and Intelligence to compute HP/Mana restoration amounts.
Restore actor HP and Mana after resting (values derived from Str/Int reads; multiplier inferred).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BEDROLL implements two processes: U8P_BEDROLL::look and U8P_BEDROLL::use.
